rules.name: LC_Process_Distribute
rules.description: Process/Complete action: distributes cost amounts from landedCostCost lines across the receipt lines (M_InOutLine) referenced by landedCostReceipt. Creates M_LandedCostAllocation records. Distribution uses the method specified per cost line (by amount, quantity, volume, weight, or unit cost).

rules.name: LC_Distribution_Calc_Amount
rules.description: When allocations are generated, the allocated amount per receipt line is calculated proportionally based on the distribution method: Amount=proportional to line amount, Quantity=proportional to qty, Volume=proportional to product volume, Weight=proportional to product weight, Costs=proportional to existing cost.

rules.name: LC_Update_Product_Cost
rules.description: After allocation, update the product's average cost (M_Product_Costing or M_CostingRule records) to include the landed cost. This adjusts inventory valuation for the received products.

rules.name: ReadOnly_When_Processed
rules.description: Lock all editable fields on the header and cost lines when document status is Completed or Voided. Allocations are always read-only.

rules.name: LC_Cost_Validate_Receipt_Scope
rules.description: If a cost line specifies a specific goods receipt (M_InOut_ID) or receipt line (M_InOutLine_ID), validate that it belongs to one of the receipts referenced in the landedCostReceipt tab. Prevents orphaned cost allocations.

rules.name: LC_Void_Reverse_Allocations
rules.description: Void action: reverse all M_LandedCostAllocation records and undo the product cost adjustments made during processing.
